mapper.select: SELECT * FROM departments WHERE deleted = FALSE ORDER BY id ASC
SELECT * FROM departments WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted = FALSE
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO departments (name, parent_id, sort, created_at, updated_at) VALUES (#{name}, #{parentId}, #{sort}, NOW(), NOW())
mapper.update:
UPDATE departments
name = #{name}, parent_id = #{parentId}, sort = #{sort}, updated_at = NOW()
WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted = FALSE
UPDATE departments SET deleted = TRUE, updated_at = NOW() WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted = FALSE
